mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, ability_id, ability_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_ability_relation_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1

SELECT id, app_id, ability_id, ability_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_ability_relation_t WHERE app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ability_type = #{abilityType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND status = 1
SELECT id, app_id, ability_id, ability_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time FROM openplatform_app_ability_relation_t WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO openplatform_app_ability_relation_t (id, app_id, ability_id, ability_type, tenant_id, status, create_by, create_time, last_update_by, last_update_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{abilityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{abilityType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3), #{lastUpdateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(3))
